ddls:
CREATE TABLE "crime_incidents" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crime incident */,
  "offense_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the offense type */,
  "offense_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the offense category */,
  "reported_date" TEXT /* Date the crime was reported */,
  "geo_lon" REAL /* Longitude of the crime location */,
  "geo_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the crime location */,
  "incident_description" TEXT /* Description of the incident */,
  "incident_status" TEXT /* Status of the incident (e.g., open, closed, pending) */,
  "priority_level" TEXT /* Priority level of the incident (e.g., high, medium, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_offense_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("offense_type_id") REFERENCES offense_types ("offense_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_crime_incidents_offense_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("offense_category_id") REFERENCES offense_categories ("offense_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offense_types" (
  "offense_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offense type */,
  "offense_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the offense type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the offense type */,
  "severity_level" TEXT /* Severity level of the offense type (e.g., felony, misdemeanor) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "offense_categories" (
  "offense_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offense category */,
  "offense_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the offense category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the offense category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offense_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "geo_lon" REAL /* Longitude of the location */,
  "geo_lat" REAL /* Latitude of the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Street address of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City of the location */,
  "state" TEXT /* State of the location */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Zip code of the location */,
  "location_type" TEXT /* Type of location (e.g., residential, commercial, public) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "dates" (
  "date_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each date */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of the crime */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day of the week */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month of the year */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the crime */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_incident_offense_types" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime incident */,
  "offense_type_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offense type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "offense_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_incident_offense_categories" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime incident */,
  "offense_category_id" INTEGER /* ID of the offense category */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "offense_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_incident_locations" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime incident */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_incident_dates" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime incident */,
  "date_id" INTEGER /* ID of the date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "date_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "officers" (
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each officer */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the officer */,
  "badge_number" INTEGER /* Badge number of the officer */,
  "rank" TEXT /* Rank of the officer */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of the officer (e.g., patrol, detective) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the officer (e.g., police, sheriff) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crime_incident_officers" (
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime incident */,
  "officer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the officer */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the officer in the incident (e.g., lead, assisting) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("incident_id", "officer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "incident_reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime incident */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date the report was filed */,
  "report_description" TEXT /* Description of the report */,
  "report_status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., submitted, approved, rejected) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_incident_reports_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES crime_incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "evidence" (
  "evidence_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each evidence */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime incident */,
  "evidence_type" TEXT /* Type of evidence (e.g., physical, digital) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the evidence */,
  "collected_date" TEXT /* Date the evidence was collected */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("evidence_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_evidence_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES crime_incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "witnesses" (
  "witness_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each witness */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime incident */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the witness */,
  "contact_info" TEXT /* Contact information of the witness */,
  "statement" TEXT /* Statement of the witness */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("witness_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_witnesses_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES crime_incidents ("incident_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveillance_footage" (
  "footage_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each footage */,
  "incident_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crime incident */,
  "camera_location" TEXT /* Location of the camera */,
  "recording_date" TEXT /* Date the footage was recorded */,
  "footage_description" TEXT /* Description of the footage */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("footage_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveillance_footage_incident_id FOREIGN KEY ("incident_id") REFERENCES crime_incidents ("incident_id")
)
column_names: Unique identifier for each crime incident
Status of the incident (e.g., open, closed, pending)
Priority level of the incident (e.g., high, medium, low)
Unique identifier for each offense type
Severity level of the offense type (e.g., felony, misdemeanor)
Unique identifier for each offense category
Type of location (e.g., residential, commercial, public)
Unit of the officer (e.g., patrol, detective)
Department of the officer (e.g., police, sheriff)
Role of the officer in the incident (e.g., lead, assisting)
Status of the report (e.g., submitted, approved, rejected)
